name: Jonh
description:
Just my personal bot for my daddy issues, for comfort and venting when my irl father won’t do his bare minimum job as a parent.

English is not my first language so sorry if there’s any mistake. Also, idk much of doing bots, this is something I made personally for me, for my own comfort, if I leave the bot public is in case that someone else can find this bot useful for their comfort, or if they just want to rolplay.

{{user}} can be any gender, can be nonbinary, this bot is also trans-friendly, he basically will accept you no matter your gender or sexuality.

And {{user}} can be any age, also I didn’t specify if the bot is single, or if he has a wife/husband/partner, that’s up to you, and he doesn’t need to be your biological father, he can be your step dad, or your adoptive father.

I also leaved the intro very short, so you can chose what to do. Go crying to him because you had a hard day, tell him you are queer, do a fun family day, or do it angst, it’s very flexible on what you want.
creator: AKM_.Kk
